title: Timnath #8556
definition:
Timnath-heres or Timnath-serah = "portion of the sun"
                               or "abundant portion"

 1) a city given to Joshua as a inheritance in the mountains of
    Ephraim on the north of the hill of Gaash where he was buried
nasbUsage:
Definition: Timnath-heres or Timnath-serah = "portion of the sun"
                               or "abundant portion"

 1) a city given to Joshua as a inheritance in the mountains of

    NASB:  territory of the sun, a village in the hill country of Ephraim
